top_signals.title: Lone Star Weighs Sale of Lender IKB After Nearly 20 Years
top_signals.summary: Buyout firm Lone Star Funds is in the early stages of exploring a sale of IKB Deutsche Industriebank AG nearly two decades after investing in the German lender, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

alerts.title: Lone Star Weighs Sale of Lender IKB After Nearly 20 Years
